name: Orange Angel Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 small loaf angel food cake, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from the 11-ounce can of mandarin oranges into a large cup and add water to make 1 cup of liquid. Bring to a boil in the microwave.
2. Add gelatin to the boiling mixture and stir until it dissolves.
3. Cool the mixture until it is just warm.
4. Add orange sherbet and mix until melted.
5. Add whipped cream and pour 1/3 of the mixture into a 9x9-inch glass pan.
6. Add cake cubes to the pan.
7. Cover with mandarin oranges and the rest of the gelatin mixture.
8. Chill.
9. Garnish with additional orange segments before serving.
